zh.London St Nicholas Cole Abbey with St Ni: 英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 尼古拉斯 高爾 艾比 煙雨 聖 尼古拉斯 奧拉福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margerie Wheeler於1532年9月25日出生在英國武斯特斯爾貝爾布盧頓時，她的父親John Wheeler42歲，母親Mary Cooke39歲。她於1553年9月25日與William Gill在英國武斯特斯爾貝爾布盧頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1584年9月在英國艾可梅希享年52歲，埋葬在英國素瑞希阿德利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margerie Wheeler于1532年9月25日出生在英国武斯特斯爾貝爾布盧頓时，她的父亲John Wheeler42岁，母亲Mary Cooke39岁。她于1553年9月25日与William Gill在英国武斯特斯爾貝爾布盧頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1584年9月在英国艾可梅希享年52岁，埋葬在英国素瑞希阿德利。

nameMeanings.name: Wheeler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a wheelwright, a maker of wheels (primarily for carts and other vehicles, but also other kinds of wheels, for use in spinning or other manufacturing processes), from Middle English wheler, whegheler, a derivative of Old English hweogol, hweowol, hwēol ‘wheel’.
History: A founder of Salisbury, NH, in 1634 was John Wheeler.

variants.name: Rower
meanings: English: occupational name from Anglo-Norman French roer ‘wheelwright’ (Old French roier, rouwier, rouer, an agent derivative of roue ‘wheel’). Compare Wheeler .
English: occupational name from Middle English rouer(e) ‘rower, oarsman’. Compare Rother .

variants.name: Wheelwright
meanings: English (Yorkshire): occupational name from Middle English whelewright(e), whelrihte ‘wheelwright, maker of wheels and wheeled vehicles’ (Old English hwēol + wyrhta). See also Wheeler .

History: John Wheelwright (c. 1592–1679), clergyman, came to Boston, MA, from Lincolnshire, England in 1636. He was banished from Massachusettes for his support of his sister-in-law, Anne Hutchinson, in the antinomian controversy; he set up a community at Exeter, NH.

nameMeanings.name: Margerie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Margary
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Margerie Wheeler was born on 25 September 1532, in Belbroughton, Worcestershire, England, her father, John Wheeler, was 42 and her mother, Mary Cooke, was 39. She married William Gill on 25 September 1553, in Belbroughton, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in September 1584, in Messing, Essex, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Headley, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margerie Wheeler est née le 25 septembre 1532, à Belbroughton, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Wheeler, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Mary Cooke, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé William Gill le 25 septembre 1553, à Belbroughton, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en septembre 1584, à Messing, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Headley, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.London St Nicholas Cole Abbey with St Ni: London St Nicholas Cole Abbey with St Nicholas Olave, Middlesex, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Margerie Wheeler am 25. September 1532 in Belbroughton, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Wheeler 42 und ihre Mutter Mary Cooke 39. Sie hat am 25. September 1553 in Belbroughton, Worcestershire, England William Gill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb im September 1584 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Messing, Essex, England und wurde in Headley, Surrey, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margerie Wheeler è nata il il 25 settembre 1532 nel Belbroughton, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, John Wheeler, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Mary Cooke, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato William Gill il 25 settembre 1553, nel Belbroughton, Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel settembre 1584, nel Messing, Essex, England, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Headley, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margerie Wheelerが1532年9月25日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベルブロウトンで生まれた時，父John Wheelerは42歳，母Mary Cookeは39歳であった。1553年9月25日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベルブロウトンでWilliam Gillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1584年9月にイギリスエセックスメシングで52歳で死去し，イギリススリーヘドリーにて埋葬された。

ko.London St Nicholas Cole Abbey with St Ni: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 닉홀아스 콜 애브브이 위스 스트 닉홀아스 올레이브
ko.lifeSummary: Margerie Wheeler(이)가 1532년 9월 25일 영국 워스스터실르 벨브루그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Wheeler(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Cooke(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1553년 9월 25일 영국 워스스터실르 벨브루그h턴에서 William Gill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1584년 9월 영국 에세스 메징에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리 헤들리에 묻혔다.

pt.London St Nicholas Cole Abbey with St Ni: London St Nicholas Cole Abbey with St Nicholas Olave, Middlesex, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margerie Wheeler nasceu em 25 de setembro de 1532, em Belbroughton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Wheeler, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Mary Cooke, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com William Gill em 25 de setembro de 1553, em Belbroughton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em setembro de 1584, em Messing, Essex, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Headley, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.London St Nicholas Cole Abbey with St Ni: лондон ст ничолас кол эбби вит ст ничолас олав, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margerie Wheeler родилась 25 сентября 1532 г. в местности белброугтон, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Wheeler было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Cooke, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Gill 25 сентября 1553 г. в местности белброугтон, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла сентябрь 1584 г. в местности мессинг, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности хидли, сурри, Англия.

Se casó con William Gill el 25 de septiembre de 1553, en Belbroughton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en septiembre de 1584, en Messing, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Headley, Surrey, Inglaterra.
